parameters.query: SELECT dp.slack_channel_id, dp.incoming_webhook_url FROM public.delivery_preferences dp WHERE dp.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND dp.channel = 'slack' AND dp.is_active = true LIMIT 1;

SELECT log_enablement_delivery('{{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.user_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.artifact_type }}', {{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.artifact_id ? "'" + $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.artifact_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.competitor_name ? "'" + $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.competitor_name + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.channel }}', {{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.recipient_team ? "'" + $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.recipient_team + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.recipient_ids ? "ARRAY[" + $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.recipient_ids.map(id => "'" + id + "'::uuid").join(',') + "]" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.deal_id ? "'" + $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.deal_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ JSON.stringify($('Validate & Normalize').first().json.metadata) }}'::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, channel: $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.channel, artifact_type: $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.artifact_type }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'No Slack webhook configured. Please connect Slack in Settings > Integrations.' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, channel: $('Validate & Normalize').first().json.channel, note: 'Email delivery not yet implemented' }) }}
